data.title: Axo Copper wraps up $40.25M bought deal funding with full over-allotment option exercise.
data.description: Last week, a report was released stating that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.5%, marking the lowest rate in the past decade. The report indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and leading to a boost in consumer confidence. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in underemployment, with the rate falling to 8.2%. These positive indicators have contributed to a surge in the stock market, with major indices reaching record highs. Experts believe that the strong job market and economic growth are driving this positive momentum.

data.title: Warsh's ambitious plans for Fed's balance sheet may face challenges.
data.description: If Warsh intends to make significant changes to the Federal Reserve's balance sheet, he may need to adjust his expectations.

data.title: PX Holdings Inc. acquires Freight Exchange of North America from Redwood Logistics to expand, boost growth for Pure Freight Lines Ltd. & Management.
data.description: In Chicago, PX Holdings Inc., parent company of Pure Freight Lines Ltd. and Pure Freight Management, along with Redwood Logistics, a leading fourth-party logistics (4PL) provider, have revealed a strategic partnership expansion. This comes after PX Holdings acquired Freight Exchange of North America from Redwood Logistics. The move aims to drive growth for Pure Freight and broaden Redwood's 4PL model. This acquisition marks a significant step in enhancing their capabilities in the logistics sector, solidifying their position in the market.

data.title: Several companies including Palo Alto Networks and Carvana are set to report earnings this week. Analysts expect Palo Alto Networks to report earnings of 94 cents per share on revenue of $2.58 billion. Earnings calendar includes companies like Medtronic, Energy Transfer LP, Nano Nuclear Energy Inc, and Devon Energy Corp. for the week ahead. For full story visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: The article discusses the upcoming fourth-quarter earnings reports from various companies in retail, energy, and tech sectors. The report mentions specific companies like Medtronic Plc (NYSE: MDT), Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET), HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: HIVE), Palo Alto Networks, Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS), Nano Nuclear Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NNE), Quantum Corp. (NASDAQ: QMCO), Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN), Moody's Corp. (NYSE: MCO), Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI), and Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) with their respective earnings announcements. For example, Palo Alto Networks’ earnings expectations are 94 cents per share on $2.58 billion revenue. The article also mentions the stock movement of CVNA. More information on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EverDriven launches SafeOps Council to set new industry safety standard, boasting 99.99% accident-free rate.
data.description: EverDriven, a prominent provider of Alternative Student Transportation in the US, has introduced SafeOps, a safety excellence council aiming to enhance the company's safety protocols for specialized student transportation services. The company, known for its exceptional safety standards, boasts an impressive 99.99% accident-free rate over two million trips in the previous year. SafeOps will further improve upon this record and set new benchmarks for safety within the industry.

data.title: Petrus Resources closes acquisition of operated Cardium assets, funds with equity financings, and announces 2026 budget.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 19, 2026, Petrus Resources Ltd. ("Petrus" or the "Company") revealed the completion of its acquisition of operated, oil-weighted Cardium assets in the Harmattan region of Alberta. This acquisition, referred to as the "Acquisition," has now been finalized. Moreover, the accompanying equity financings have also been closed. The Company has additionally obtained approval for its 2026 capital budget and guidance. Petrus Resources Ltd. is listed as PRQ on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX).

data.title: Herantis Pharma to receive EUR 8.0 million grant for Phase 2 trial of HER-096 in Parkinson's disease research.
data.description: Today, in Espoo, Finland, on 19 February 2026, the clinical-stage biotech company, Herantis Pharma Plc (“Herantis”), revealed its role as the leader of a consortium chosen to receive a potential EUR 8.0 million grant from the Horizon Europe 2025 Research and Innovation program. This funding falls under the ‘Boosting the translation of biotech research into innovative health therapies’ topic. Herantis focuses on developing disease-modifying treatments aimed at halting the progression of Parkinson’s disease.

data.title: Signadot transforms into Kubernetes-native developer platform, enabling scalable agentic development. #ai #Kubernetes
data.description: Signadot, a platform for ephemeral environments, based in San Francisco, recently announced its transformation into a developer platform for agentic development at scale. This move positions Signadot as a Kubernetes-native platform.
IDF: IDF forces continue to clear the Yellow Line area: The Northern Brigade and Yahyam fighters destroyed an underground route containing several guest rooms in the Beit Hanoun area.

data.title: Cross River Bank opens full-service branch in Delaware, expands banking services; aiming to increase access to credit.
data.description: Cross River Bank, a technology infrastructure provider offering embedded financial solutions, has opened a full-service branch in Wilmington, Delaware. This expansion signifies a pivotal step in Cross River's goal of increasing access to financial services and providing innovative banking solutions nationwide. The Delaware branch enables Cross River to cater to a larger number of borrowers with essential credit solutions, further establishing its presence in the region.

data.title: Hims & Hers buys Eucalyptus for $1.15 billion, stock rallies.
data.description: The stock of Him surged following the announcement by the telehealth firm to purchase Eucalyptus in a deal worth $1.15 billion. This acquisition by Hims & Hers led to a rise in their stock value, reflecting positive investor sentiment.

data.title: AI stocks have reset in 2026; Nvidia earnings, GTC conference key. Apple, Nvidia, Google, and Microsoft face uncertainty.
data.description: Stocks related to artificial intelligence have experienced fluctuations recently. Nvidia is set to reveal its earnings and host the GTC conference. Apple's future is uncertain, whereas Microsoft has not met expectations. The year 2026 marks a reset for AI stocks. Investors are awaiting updates on Apple, Nvidia, Google, and Microsoft to gauge the next steps in this sector.
